posts.author: tovy (Tovy Schwartz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Eyesore on shareable boards
This board is visible to anyone on the web with a shareable link

What are you trying to achieve

Pls add an “X” option on the shareable boards eyesore that is
This board is visible to anyone on the web with a shareable link
It is small detail and I’m sure a quick fix which would help a lot for people like me who are trying to have a clean view
Option 2 - At least make it so that when I Collapse header tabs that should also be hidden
